reported_surface: S01 check_arg.py — argv, len y exit codes

root_cause.mechanism: Decimal token placeholders were consumed by the later Python number regex, so restoration displayed token indexes instead of source tokens.
root_cause.blast_radius: All Python CodeBlock surfaces containing strings, comments, decorators, keywords, builtins, or numbers; Bash used the same fragile placeholder design but lacked the destructive number pass.

fix.strategy: Single-pass tokenization and one-time HTML escaping without placeholders or repeated mutation.

browser_fidelity.screenshots: representative code window per populated section/tab and one playground per section; every surface is still compared and listed

next_gate: Complete CI screenshot audit, merge, deploy, verify live S01 regression and favicon, then begin the 72 classified runtime skips.
